channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19430] sanity-pcc test_6: FAIL: failed to detach file /mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/570ca25f-c3f7-4e8e-820b-c53e7ce22b93

test_6 failed with the following error:

/tmp/f6.sanity-pcc: Linux rev 1.0 ext4 filesystem data, UUID=292e9bfc-a8af-44a1-97f7-9b0ac286c818 (extents) (64bit) (large files) (huge files)
CMD: onyx-77vm2 mount -t ext4 -o loop,usrquota,grpquota /tmp/f6.sanity-pcc /mnt/pcc.d6.sanity-pcc
CMD: onyx-77vm2 mkdir -p /mnt/pcc.d6.sanity-pcc/d6.sanity-pcc
Starting copytool 'agt1' on 'onyx-77vm2' with cmdline 'lhsmtool_posix --archive-format=v2 --hsm-root=/mnt/pcc.d6.sanity-pcc/d6.sanity-pcc --daemon --pid-file=/var/run/lhsmtool_posix.pid --archive 2  "/mnt/lustre"'
CMD: onyx-77vm2 lhsmtool_posix --archive-format=v2 --hsm-root=/mnt/pcc.d6.sanity-pcc/d6.sanity-pcc --daemon --pid-file=/var/run/lhsmtool_posix.pid --archive 2  "/mnt/lustre" < /dev/null > "/autotest/autotest-2/2025-09-23/lustre-reviews_full-part-2_116858_1003_398660a4-a85d-4380-9885-b8a714c99ad0//sanity-pcc.test_6.copytool2_log.onyx-77vm2.log" 2>&1
CMD: onyx-77vm2 /usr/sbin/lctl pcc add /mnt/lustre /mnt/pcc.d6.sanity-pcc/d6.sanity-pcc -p projid={100}\ rwid=2\ pccrw=1
CMD: onyx-77vm2 /usr/bin/lfs pcc attach -w -i 2 /mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc
CMD: onyx-77vm2 /usr/bin/lfs pcc state /mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc
CMD: onyx-77vm2 multiop /mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc OSMWUc
CMD: onyx-77vm2 /usr/bin/lfs pcc state /mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc
CMD: onyx-77vm2 mmap_cat /mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc
CMD: onyx-77vm2 /usr/bin/lfs pcc state /mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc
CMD: onyx-77vm2 /usr/bin/lfs pcc detach /mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc
onyx-77vm2: lfs pcc pcc: cannot open '/mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc': Invalid argument (22)
onyx-77vm2: detach: cannot detach '/mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc' from PCC: Invalid argument
pdsh@onyx-77vm1: onyx-77vm2: ssh exited with exit code 22
 sanity-pcc test_6: @@@@@@ FAIL: failed to detach file /mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/116858 - 6.12.0-55.33.1.el10_0.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/116858 - 4.18.0-553.71.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-pcc test_6 - failed to detach file /mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc
item.summary: sanity-pcc test_6: FAIL: failed to detach file /mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63097/
Subject: LU-19430 tests: except sanity-pcc test 6, 7b, 35, 102 on el9.7+
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 894398b260276825d7d37ee95cf2d3a7efac105f
It looks like some io_uring API is not being enabled/passed through for PCC file_operations on new kernels, or similar?

sanity-pcc test 102 also failed on RHEL 9.7, 10.0, and 10.1 clients:

CMD: onyx-157vm2 fio --name=seqwrite --ioengine=io_uring --bs=4096 --direct=1 --numjobs=2 --iodepth=64 --size=10M --filename=/mnt/lustre/f102.sanity-pcc --rw=write
pdsh@onyx-157vm1: onyx-157vm2: ssh exited with exit code 2
seqwrite: (g=0): rw=write, bs=(R) 4096B-4096B, (W) 4096B-4096B, (T) 4096B-4096B, ioengine=io_uring, iodepth=64
...
fio-3.36
Starting 2 processes
seqwrite: Laying out IO file (1 file / 10MiB)
fio: pid=385552, err=1/file:engines/io_uring.c:1049, func=io_queue_init, error=Operation not permitted
fio: pid=385553, err=1/file:engines/io_uring.c:1049, func=io_queue_init, error=Operation not permitted

Run status group 0 (all jobs):
 sanity-pcc test_102: @@@@@@ FAIL: fio seqwrite /mnt/lustre/f102.sanity-pcc failed

 
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/e12e8495-06c1-4a63-b4e6-f7116b504d9f

"Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63097
Subject: LU-19430 tests: except sanity-pcc test 6, 7b, 35, 102 on el9.7+
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: c297bfb0a740ecd2c687ade0c4f5b6505aa4918e

I'd suggest to temporarily except this test case from sanity-pcc.sh.
This is more like a OS version related bug.

I will build a rhel-9.7 system to test and debug it later.
Occurred consistently on RHEL 9.7, 10.0 and 10.1 test sessions.
Resolving the test failures in this ticket will make RHEL 10.x full-part-2 test sessions pass with green status.

Hi qian_wc,
Could you please take a look at these RHEL 10.0 specific failures?

More sanity-pcc subtests failed:

sanity-pcc: FAIL: test_6 failed to detach file /mnt/lustre/f6.sanity-pcc
sanity-pcc: FAIL: test_7b failed to detach file /mnt/lustre/f7b.sanity-pcc
sanity-pcc: FAIL: test_35 failed to PCC-RO detach /mnt/lustre/f35.sanity-pcc

https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/570ca25f-c3f7-4e8e-820b-c53e7ce22b93
